originalTitle: Egypt v Iran: World Cup 2026 – live
summary: Minute-by-minute report : Team Melli are looking for their first win while Egypt hope to stay top of Group G. Join Jonathan Howcroft for updates
content: There’s still plenty of time to catch up with Max and the gang. Feel free to keep me company by emailing your thoughts about today’s match, and anything related to the World Cup to jonathan.howcroft.freelance@theguardian.com. Some possible topics: Adidas kits are way better than those of all other manufactures. Before the group stage I only fancied one of France, Spain, or Argentina to win the World Cup. I would now be comfortable adding Portugal to that list if Ronaldo wasn’t a guaranteed starter / or maintains the form he showed against Uzbekistan. This World Cup feels like a reckoning for South American football. Bolivia lost to Iraq in the pre-tournament playoff, Uruguay and Paraguay have been bad, Ecuador got lucky, Colombia are dull, and Brazil are reliant on an Italian conjurer. Argentina are the outlier and it is no surprise to see how much they dominated CONMEBOL qualification. If my explanation of the permutations facing the Group G protagonists was insufficient, here’s a more fulsome description with tables. This is going to be a multiscreen/multitab experience. I recommend opening up another window and inviting Sam Lewis to keep you informed on all things New Zealand v Belgium. Hello everybody and welcome to live coverage of Egypt v Iran as Group G reaches its conclusion in Seattle. Kick-off at Lumen Field is 8pm local time (11pm EDT / 4am BST / 1pm AEST). Welcome to what promises to be the most gloriously chaotic group stage denouement of this World Cup. Practically every combination of outcomes is possible as Egypt, Iran, Belgium and New Zealand battle to make it to the round of 32. Egypt, on top of the group with four points, are the only team that can guarantee qualification with a draw. Iran, second on two points, will qualify with a win, but may still sneak through with a draw if there is no winner in the Belgium v New Zealand clash. New Zealand must win to progress. Belgium need a win to guarantee safe passage but may get away with a draw if other results fall their way. With both matches kicking off simultaneously expect plenty of fluctuations in tempo and atmosphere as the four teams compute in real-time what they must do to stay alive. Got it? Good. That’s NumberWang! I’ll be back with a news roundup and team news shortly but in the meantime you can follow the closing stages of Group H where Cape Verde are destined for the round of 32 and Uruguay are on their way home.
chineseTitle: 埃及 vs 伊朗：2026 年世界杯 – 直播
chineseSummary: 每分钟报道：梅利队正在寻求他们的第一场胜利，而埃及队希望保持 G 组的领先地位。加入乔纳森·豪克罗夫特了解最新动态
chineseContent: 还有足够的时间来追上麦克斯和他的伙伴们。请随时将您对今天比赛以及与世界杯相关的任何想法通过电子邮件发送至 jonathan.howcroft.freelance@theguardian.com 来陪伴我。一些可能的主题：阿迪达斯的球衣比所有其他制造商的球衣都要好得多。小组赛之前我只希望法国、西班牙、阿根廷三者中的一个能够赢得世界杯。如果罗纳尔多不能保证首发/或者保持他对阵乌兹别克斯坦队的状态，我现在很乐意将葡萄牙队添加到该名单中。本届世界杯感觉就像是对南美足球的一场清算。玻利维亚在预赛附加赛中输给了伊拉克，乌拉圭和巴拉圭表现不佳，厄瓜多尔很幸运，哥伦比亚表现平淡，而巴西则依赖意大利魔术师。阿根廷是个异类，看到他们在南美洲预选赛中占据主导地位也就不足为奇了。如果我对 G 组主角面临的排列的解释还不够，这里有一个更丰富的表格描述。这将是多屏幕/多选项卡体验。我建议打开另一个窗口并邀请萨姆·刘易斯（Sam Lewis）让您了解新西兰与比利时的所有事情。大家好，欢迎收看埃及对阵伊朗的现场直播，G 组在西雅图结束比赛。流明球场 (Lumen Field) 开球时间为当地时间晚上 8 点（东部夏令时间晚上 11 点/英国夏令时间凌晨 4 点/澳大利亚东部时间下午 1 点）。欢迎观看本届世界杯小组赛阶段最精彩、最混乱的结局。实际上，每种结果的组合都有可能，埃及、伊朗、比利时和新西兰都在争夺进入 32 强的资格。埃及以 4 分位居小组第一，是唯一一支可以通过平局确保出线的球队。积两分排名第二的伊朗队将以一场胜利晋级，但仍有可能
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
